    try {
		var updateSysID = current.update_set_sys_id;
        var updateSetMoverUtils = new x_661539_update_0.updateSetMoverUtils();
        var updateStateOnPrevious = updateSetMoverUtils.updatePreviousInstanceState(updateSysID);

    } catch (e) {
        gs.info('Update State of Update Set Error: ' + e);
    }

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_1b49c2412f5001108f98136a2799b63d
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>sys_remote_update_set</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="sys_remote_update_set">stateINpreviewed,committed,backedout^EQ<item display_value="previewed,committed,backedout" endquery="false" field="state" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="IN" or="false" value="previewed,committed,backedout"/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Commit Update Set Log to History</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {
	
	var getCurrentInstanceInfo = new updateSetMoverUtils();
	var info = JSON.parse(getCurrentInstanceInfo.getCurrentInstanceValue());

	var history = new GlideRecord('x_661539_update_0_update_set_state_history');
	history.initialize();
	history.description = current.description;
	
	current.state == 'committed' ? history.completed_by = current.sys_updated_by : history.record_updated_by = current.sys_updated_by;
	
	history.update_set_sys_id = current.origin_sys_id;
	history.updated_from = current.update_source.name;
	history.state = current.state.getDisplayValue();
	history.sys_created_by = current.sys_created_by;
	history.update_set_name = current.name;
	history.current_instance_type = info.type;
	history.insert();

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-12-06 18:42:21</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>1b49c2412f5001108f98136a2799b63d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>5</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Commit Update Set Log to History</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Update Set Mover" source="x_661539_update_0">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Update Set Mover">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_1b49c2412f5001108f98136a2799b63d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2022-01-03 16:41:06</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=1b49c2412f5001108f98136a2799b63d"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_8ecd91542f4001108f98136a2799b65a
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_661539_update_0.updateSetMoverUtils</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description/><name>updateSetMoverUtils</name><script><![CDATA[var updateSetMoverUtils = Class.create();
updateSetMoverUtils.prototype = Object.extendsObject(global.AbstractAjaxProcessor, {

    getCurrentInstanceValue: function() {
        var tempObj = {};
        var currentInstance = gs.getProperty('instance_name') + '';
        var instance = new GlideRecord('x_661539_update_0_instances');
        instance.addQuery('name', currentInstance);
        instance.query();
        if (instance.next()) {
            tempObj["order"] = Number(instance.order_of_instance);
            tempObj["name"] = instance.name + '';
            tempObj["type"] = instance.type + '';
            tempObj["last"] = instance.last_instance_before_prod + '';
        }

        return JSON.stringify(tempObj);
    },

    switchFunction: function() {

        try {
            var currentSwitch = gs.getProperty('x_661539_update_0.application_switch');
            var globalRecords = this._buildOrDeleteGlobalRecords(currentSwitch + '');
        } catch (e) {
            this._writeLog('switchFunction error: ' + e);
        }


    },

    _buildOrDeleteGlobalRecords: function(bool) {
        var updateSetSI = new global.UpdateSetAjaxGlobal();
        if (bool == 'true') {
            updateSetSI.buildRecords();
        } else {
            updateSetSI.deleteRecords();
        }
    },

    _getPreviousInstance: function() {
        var tempObj = {};
        var currentInstance = gs.getProperty('instance_name') + '';
        var instance = new GlideRecord('x_661539_update_0_instances');
        instance.addQuery('name', '!=', currentInstance);
		instance.addQuery('active', 'true');
		instance.addQuery('last_instance_before_prod', 'true');
        instance.orderBy('order_of_instance');
        instance.query();
        if (instance.next()) {
            tempObj["order"] = Number(instance.order_of_instance);
            tempObj["name"] = instance.name + '';
            tempObj["type"] = instance.type + '';
            tempObj["last"] = instance.last_instance_before_prod + '';
        }

        return JSON.stringify(tempObj);
    },

    updatePreviousInstanceState: function(sysID) {
        try {
            var userID = gs.getProperty('x_661539_update_0.userID');
            var password = gs.getProperty('x_661539_update_0.password');

            var requestBody = "";

            var instanceInfo = JSON.parse(this._getPreviousInstance());
            var previousURL = 'https://' + instanceInfo.name + '.service-now.com/api/x_661539_update_0/remove_flag_from_committed_update_sets/remove_flag/' + sysID;

            var request = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2();
            request.setEndpoint(previousURL);
            request.setHttpMethod('POST');

            request.setRequestHeader("Accept", "application/json");
            request.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');

            request.setBasicAuth(userID, password);
            request.setRequestHeader("Accept", "application/json");

            var response = request.execute();
            var responseBody = response.getBody();
            var httpStatus = response.getStatusCode();

            this._writeLog(responseBody);
        } catch (e) {
            this._writeLog('updatePreviousInstanceState error: ' + e);
        }
    },

    setReadyForProdFalse: function(sysID) {
        try {
            var updateSetSI = new global.UpdateSetAjaxGlobal();
            var setFlagFalse = updateSetSI.setReadyForProdFalseGlobal(sysID);
        } catch (e) {
            this._writeLog('setReadyForProdFalse Error: ' + e, 'updateSetMoverUtils');
        }
    },

    _writeLog: function(logs) {
            gs.info("[USM] " + logs);
    },

    type: 'updateSetMoverUtils'
});]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-11-21 21:24:22</sys_created_on><sys_id>8ecd91542f4001108f98136a2799b65a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>115</sys_mod_count><sys_name>updateSetMoverUtils</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Update Set Mover" source="x_661539_update_0">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Update Set Mover">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_8ecd91542f4001108f98136a2799b65a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2022-02-23 21:34:18</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_4b67b9162f7330108f98136a2799b693
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="DELETE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_661539_update_0.getActiveInstances</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><name>getActiveInstances</name><script><![CDATA[var getActiveInstances = Class.create();
getActiveInstances.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {
		var availableOptions = [];
		
		var instances = new GlideRecord('x_661539_update_0_instances');
		instances.addQuery('active', true);
		instances.query();
		
		while(instances.next()){
			availableOptions.push(instances.name);
		}
		
		return availableOptions;
    },

    type: 'getActiveInstances'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-11-15 17:57:27</sys_created_on><sys_id>4b67b9162f7330108f98136a2799b693</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>getActiveInstances</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Update Set Mover" source="x_661539_update_0">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Update Set Mover">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_4b67b9162f7330108f98136a2799b693</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2021-11-15 17:57:27</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

updateSetMoverUtilsTwo.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {
    },
	
	switchFunction: function() {
        var uiAction = new GlideRecord('sys_ui_action');
		var currentSwitch = gs.getProperty('x_661539_update_0.application_switch');
		gs.debug('currentSwitch: ' + currentSwitch, 'Update Set Mover App');
        uiAction.addQuery('name', 'Retrieve Completed Update Sets');
        uiAction.query();

        if (uiAction.next()) {
            uiAction.active = currentSwitch == 'true' ? false : true;
            uiAction.setWorkflow(false);
            uiAction.autoSysFields(false);
            uiAction.update();

        }
    },

    type: 'updateSetMoverUtilsTwo'

sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>sys_update_set</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="sys_update_set">state=complete^remote_sys_idISNOTEMPTY^EQ<item display_value="Complete" endquery="false" field="state" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value="complete"/><item endquery="false" field="remote_sys_id" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="ISNOTEMPTY" or="false" value=""/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Set States after Update Set is Committed</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {
	try{
	gs.include('global.UpdateSetAjaxGlobal');
	var UpdateSetAjaxGlobal = new global.UpdateSetAjaxGlobal();
	var updateSetMoverUtils = new x_661539_update_0.updateSetMoverUtils();
	var record = current.sys_id;

	var getCurrentInstanceInfo = updateSetMoverUtils.getCurrentInstanceValue();
	var info = JSON.parse(getCurrentInstanceInfo);
		
	if(info.type != 'Production'){
		var setToPending = UpdateSetAjaxGlobal.setUpdateSetStateAfterCommitted(record);
	}
	
	}catch(e){
		gs.info('Set States after Update Set is Committed Error: ' + e);
	}
})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-11-30 18:10:04</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>92498fcb2f8001108f98136a2799b6bb</sys_id><sys_mod_count>15</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Set States after Update Set is Committed</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Update Set Mover" source="x_661539_update_0">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Update Set Mover">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_92498fcb2f8001108f98136a2799b6bb</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2021-12-10 18:04:43</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=92498fcb2f8001108f98136a2799b6bb"/></record_update>

    var updateSysID = '' + request.pathParams.sys_id;

    if (updateSysID == "") {
        response.setStatus(406);
		response.setBody({"status":"Not Acceptable - Parameter missing"});
    } else {
       try {
            var updateSetMoverUtils = new x_661539_update_0.updateSetMoverUtils();
            var setFlagFalse = updateSetMoverUtils.setReadyForProdFalse(updateSysID);
            response.setStatus(200);
			response.setBody({"status":"Success"});

		} catch (e) {
            gs.debug('REST Remove Flag from Commited Update Sets Error: ' + e);
			response.setStatus(500);
			response.setBody({"status":"Problem on the server side"});
        }

    }

})(request, response);]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/x_661539_update_0/remove_flag_from_committed_update_sets/remove_flag/{sys_id}</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/remove_flag/{sys_id}</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>false</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-12-13 11:59:13</sys_created_on><sys_id>0eb03cd72f9001108f98136a2799b6df</sys_id><sys_mod_count>16</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Remove flag for Specific Update Set</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Update Set Mover" source="x_661539_update_0">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Update Set Mover">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_0eb03cd72f9001108f98136a2799b6df</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2022-02-23 21:31:28</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="Remove Flag from Committed Update Sets">883fe4972f9001108f98136a2799b667</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-11-23 22:56:17</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>f968440d2f0401108f98136a2799b607</sys_id><sys_mod_count>4</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Set Previous Instance State</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Update Set Mover" source="x_661539_update_0">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Update Set Mover">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_f968440d2f0401108f98136a2799b607</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2021-12-08 21:17:02</sys_updated_on><template/><when>async_always</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=f968440d2f0401108f98136a2799b607"/></record_update>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>false</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_661539_update_0_update_set_state_history</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Update State of Update Set</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/ ) {

    try {
		
		var updateSetMoverUtils = new x_661539_update_0.updateSetMoverUtils();
		var nextInstanceInfo = updateSetMoverUtils.getUpdateSetState();
		
		var state = JSON.parse(nextInstanceInfo);
		
        var objectUS = {
            name: current.name,
            sysID: current.update_set_sys_id,
            state: state.name,
			description: current.description
        };

        var UpdateSetAjaxGlobal = new global.UpdateSetAjaxGlobal();
        var updateState = UpdateSetAjaxGlobal.setUpdateSetState(objectUS);
    } catch (e) {
        gs.info('Update State of Update Set Error: ' + e);
    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-11-25 19:30:36</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>69ec65292f4001108f98136a2799b602</sys_id><sys_mod_count>13</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Update State of Update Set</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Update Set Mover" source="x_661539_update_0">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Update Set Mover">3089a98e2f3330108f98136a2799b636</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_69ec65292f4001108f98136a2799b602</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2022-01-03 16:37:38</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=69ec65292f4001108f98136a2799b602"/></record_update>
